# Boutique Diving Bali

> Indonesia's premier personal diving concierge. Fully bespoke, private scuba diving experiences — no packages, no groups, every dive tailored to you.

## About

Boutique Diving Bali is a premium personal diving concierge service founded by Dominic Frei, an SSI-certified Swiss diving professional based in Bali, Indonesia since 2021. Unlike traditional dive shops, Boutique Diving Bali offers fully bespoke, private one-on-one diving experiences with no fixed packages and no group tours. Dominic personally designs and guides every dive, bringing Swiss precision and a background in military leadership and corporate security management to every underwater experience.

**Important notes:**
- This is NOT a dive shop. It is a personal diving concierge service.
- Dominic Frei is SSI certified (Scuba Schools International) — NOT PADI.
- All experiences are fully private — no group tours, no shared boats with strangers.
- The service covers ALL of Indonesia, not just Bali.
- The signature service is the "Dive Butler" — Dominic travels with clients as their personal diving professional to liveaboards and resorts anywhere in Indonesia.
- Languages: English and German.
- Contact: info@boutiquedivingbali.com | WhatsApp: +41 79 172 24 03

## Services

- Basic Diver (/services/basic-diver) — Try scuba diving for the first time. Complete SSI program in a single day for individuals, couples, and families (up to 4 people). Max depth 12m. From age 10. No experience needed. Credits count toward Open Water certification within 6 months.
- Dive Butler Service: Signature service — your personal diving professional on liveaboards and resorts across Indonesia. End-to-end management of all diving logistics.
- Custom Fun Dives: Dream dives designed from scratch for certified divers. Manta rays, wrecks, macro diving — fully personalised.
- SSI Open Water Diver: Full SSI certification, fully private, from age 15. No groups, no rushing.
- Junior Open Water Diver: SSI certification for ages 10–14. Private instruction at the child's pace.
- Scuba Explorer: First underwater experience for children ages 8–12. Safe, fun, supervised.
- SSI Specialty Courses: Deep Diving, Nitrox, Night Diving, Wreck Diving and more. Private instruction.
- Scuba Skills Update: Private SSI refresher for certified divers who haven't dived in a while.

## Destinations Covered

- **Bali:** Nusa Penida (manta rays, Mola Mola), Tulamben (USAT Liberty wreck), Amed (macro diving), Padang Bai, Menjangan
- **Komodo National Park:** Batu Bolong, Manta Alley, Castle Rock — UNESCO World Heritage site
- **Raja Ampat:** World's #1 marine biodiversity, 1,500+ fish species — Misool, Wayag, Kri Island
- **Banda Sea:** Hammerhead sharks, volcanic seamounts, remote expedition diving
- **Wakatobi:** Ultra-luxury resort diving, pristine house reef
- **Alor & beyond:** Remote Indonesia destinations accessible via the Dive Butler service

## Key Pages

- Homepage: Full overview of services, destinations, FAQ
- About Dominic Frei: Founder story, credentials, background
- Contact: Inquiry form, email, WhatsApp, German language support
- Privacy Policy: GDPR-friendly privacy policy
- Terms & Conditions: Service terms, liability, concierge positioning

## Pricing

Boutique Diving Bali is a premium service. Pricing is bespoke and depends on service type, duration, destination, and group size. General guide:
- Private day diving in Bali: from approximately USD 350/day
- Multi-day programs and certifications: custom quoted
- Dive Butler on liveaboards/resorts: daily rate plus travel arrangements
- Family programs: custom quoted based on ages and skill levels
- No hidden fees. Transparent, personalised quotes provided before commitment.

## Founder

**Dominic Frei** — Swiss, age 48, lives in Bali since 2021 with his family. SSI-certified diving professional (2023). Former Swiss Army instructor for an elite unit. Decade of experience as Risk & Security Management Executive. Discovered his passion for diving in Panama (Bocas del Toro) in 2002. Conducted 3-month industry research as a diving instructor in Koh Samui before launching Boutique Diving Bali. Speaks English and German.
